title: Links and Navigation Quiz
description: Test your knowledge of HTML links and navigation.

questions.question: What is the primary tag used to create a link in HTML?
Which attribute is required for the <a> tag to specify where the link should go?
What is the difference between an absolute and a relative URL?
options: Absolute URLs only work on specific sites.
Absolute URLs use the full web address; relative URLs use the current folder as a reference.
There is no difference between them.

questions.question: If you want a link to open in a new tab, which attribute and value should you add?
When linking to a specific section on the same page, what should you use in the href attribute?
options: The id of the target element preceded by a hash symbol (#)
The class of the target element
